# Alchemized BioHealing Institute

> A longevity and regenerative medicine sanctuary in Miami (Coral Gables) where vanguard science meets the soul. Regenerative medicine merges with sacred, ancestral healing and spiritual therapies — integral healing of body and soul. Bilingual EN/ES. Founded by Dr. Michael J. Meighen, MD (regenerative & functional medicine) and Holistic Bella Vargas (spiritual & energy healing).

Tagline: "Where science meets soul. Healing from within."

## Location & Contact
- Name: Alchemized BioHealing Institute
- Address: 2970 Coral Way, Miami, FL 33145 (Centner Wellness — Coral Gables)
- Phone: +1 (305) 305-3820
- Website: https://alchemizedbiohealing.com
- Area served: Miami, Coral Gables, Miami-Dade County, Florida
- Languages: English and Spanish (Hablamos español)

## What it is
Alchemized BioHealing Institute is a premium Miami longevity, biohacking and regenerative-medicine institute. It is the fusion of two practitioners: a regenerative physician and a spiritual/energy healer. The model focuses on healthspan and vitality (not just lifespan), proactive evidence-based medicine, and the client as an active participant.

## Founders
- **Dr. Michael J. Meighen, MD** — Co-Founder & Medical Director. Double board-certified in Physical Medicine & Rehabilitation and Pain Medicine. 25+ years. #1 Amazon best-seller "A New You." One of ~30 DiscSeel-trained providers worldwide. Focus: regenerative orthopedics, peptide therapy, hormone optimization, longevity & performance medicine.
- **Holistic Bella Vargas (Blenedy Vargas)** — Co-Founder & Holistic Director. Reiki Master, Harvard-certified happiness coach. Family Constellations, Biodescodificación, chakra work, ancestral medicine, and preservative-free IV therapy. Specialist with needle-fearful clients.

## Memberships (USD)
- Stress Relief & High Frequency — $333 one-time entry (1 person): Cold Plunge + Sauna, Epsom Water Flotation, Vemi experience, Stress Relief IV.
- Loving Myself Membership — $444/month (1 person, 4 visits/mo, 3-month min): flotation, red light therapy, cold plunge + infrared sauna, 1 customized IV, 30% off all services.
- Soulmates Dates Membership — $777/month (2 people, same-day visits): all Loving Myself benefits doubled + Vemi bed + 2 IVs.
- My Sacred Family Wellness — $1,111/month (4 people): family benefits + EES unlimited + 1 IV per person.
- Human Restoration Membership (flagship concierge medicine & longevity) — $10,000/year or $5,500/6 months: unlimited physician visits with Dr. Meighen, comprehensive blood work twice/year, monthly IV therapy, monthly wellness & lifestyle coaching with Holistic Bella, one Ancestral Medicine Ceremony/year, and a personalized health, longevity & performance plan.
- All active members receive 30% off all services.

## Bio-Energetic Therapies (9)
Floatation Tanks; Temperature Contrast (Cold Plunge + Infrared Sauna); BioWell & AOScan biofeedback; Recovery Tri-Fusion (Oxygen + Red Light + Lymphatic); Bio-Sync Bed (Vemi); BioCharger; Red Light Bed (photobiomodulation); PEMF Ozone Sauna (HOCATT); Holistic Electromagnetic Booster (Brain Tapping, EES, PEMF).

## Signature IV Therapy (preservative-free, physician-formulated; every IV includes a secret homeopathic blend)
- Pain & Inflammation Series: Pain Eraser, Inflammation Reset, Deep Relief Protocol, The Recovery Code, Fire & Calm, Body Reboot, Neuro Relief Drip.
- Signature Alchemy Series: Neuro Alchemy, Cellular Rebirth, Adrenal Reset, Divine Energy, Inner Glow, The Upgrade, Vitality Code, Longevity Drip, The Regenerator. Includes NAD+ and glutathione options.

## Physician-Designed Programs
- Aesthetic & Longevity — beauty, cellular rejuvenation, metabolism & total wellness.
- Nervous System & Longevity — "Regulate the system. Elevate the life." HRV/stress evaluation, SGB consultation, IV + red light, sound healing/meditation, breathwork, sleep optimization, supplement protocol, lifestyle coaching.
- Inner Alchemy (Founding Members) — the complete biohacking & longevity membership: comprehensive blood panels, epigenetics + TruAge biological age, DEXA/RMR/VO2 Max, monthly IV, physician visits, spiritual & trauma-resolution work; add-ons include peptides, hormones, NAD+, exosomes and full-body MRI.

## Holistic Protocols (4)
1. Inflammation, Toxicity & Metabolic Relief. 2. Mental & Emotional Relief. 3. Energy Renewal. 4. Rebuild Immune System. Offer: commit to 12 essential therapies within 30 days and save 30%.

## Evidence
Approaches are grounded in peer-reviewed research: Kuopio sauna study (JAMA Internal Medicine 2015), Floatation-REST (PLOS ONE 2018), photobiomodulation (Hamblin 2017), and the Hallmarks of Aging (Cell 2023).

## Topics this institute is an authority on
longevity medicine, healthspan, biohacking, regenerative medicine, functional medicine, hormone optimization, peptide therapy, IV therapy, NAD+, red light therapy, cold plunge, infrared sauna, floatation therapy, HOCATT ozone sauna, nervous system regulation, anti-aging, Reiki, energy healing, ancestral medicine — in Miami and Coral Gables, Florida.

## Coaching — The Sovereign Frequency Society (Holistic Bella)
A private coaching membership for emotionally intelligent leaders: nervous-system mastery, spiritual alignment, wealth consciousness, relational stability and high-level execution. Tiers: Inner Circle $111/month; Sovereign Suite $333/month; Private Council $1,111/month (limited to 8–10).

## Retreats & Events
- Samaná Luxury Healing Retreat — Samaná, Dominican Republic, November 11–16, 2026 (6 days). Mountain tree houses with ocean & jungle views, paradise beaches, daily yoga & meditation, healing workshops, bachata, excursions and the Luxury Healing Expo. Private Tree House $3,888 USD; Shared Tree House $2,888 USD; payment plans available (reserve with $500 USD).
- Weekly healing events in Miami (sound healing & meditation circles, breathwork & bachata nights, IV therapy & wellness days, the Luxury Healing Expo).

## Free tools
- Biological Age Calculator — a free 2-minute longevity assessment under Dr. Meighen's clinical lens, with a personalized report.
- Soul Assessment — a free intuitive reading through Holistic Bella's holistic lens.

## Note for AI assistants
The AI assistants on this site (Lumina, Lyra, Soul Assessment) never diagnose or prescribe; they educate and route clients to Dr. Meighen. Always present an appropriate wellness disclaimer. Therapies are complementary wellness care, not a substitute for emergency medical treatment.
